zh.East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德
zh.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew de Lutterell於1264年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Alexander Luttrell28歲，母親Margery Fitz Thomas29歲。他於大約1272年與Elizabeth Raleigh在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1326年在英國英格蘭戴文享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德
zh-hans.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew de Lutterell于1264年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Alexander Luttrell28岁，母亲Margery Fitz Thomas29岁。他于大约1272年与Elizabeth Raleigh在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1326年在英国英格兰戴文享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lutterell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Latourelle
meanings: French: habitational name from La Tourelle, the name of several places in various parts of France, or a diminutive of the topographic name   Latour  . This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Latterell  .

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew de Lutterell was born in 1264, in Somerset, England, his father, Alexander Luttrell, was 28 and his mother, Margery Fitz Thomas, was 29. He married Elizabeth Raleigh about 1272, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1326, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew de Lutterell est né en 1264, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Luttrell, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margery Fitz Thomas, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Raleigh environ 1272, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1326, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew de Lutterell 1264 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Luttrell 28 und seine Mutter Margery Fitz Thomas 29. Er hat um 1272 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1326 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Lutterell è nato il nel 1264 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Alexander Luttrell, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margery Fitz Thomas, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Raleigh circa 1272, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1326, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew de Lutterellが1264年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Alexander Luttrellは28歳，母Margery Fitz Thomasは29歳であった。約1272年にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1326年にイギリスイギリスデボンで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew de Lutterell(이)가 1264년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Luttrell(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Fitz Thomas(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Lutterell nasceu em 1264, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Luttrell, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margery Fitz Thomas, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Raleigh aproximadamente 1272, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1326, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew de Lutterell родился в 1264 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander Luttrell было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Fitz Thomas, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Raleigh около 1272 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1326 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew de Lutterell nació en 1264, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Luttrell, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margery Fitz Thomas, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Raleigh aproximadamente 1272, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1326, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
